response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with a strong background in distributed systems and software craftsmanship, but he lacks the executive leadership, team scaling (10 to 30+), and deep AI-native fintech architecture required for this CTO role. His experience with AI agents is very recent and primarily at the individual contributor level rather than driving strategic, multi-agent enterprise architecture.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in backend engineering, microservices, and high-throughput distributed systems.
Strong engineering fundamentals with a focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Insufficient production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for real-time financial decisioning.
No demonstrated experience managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced delivery partners, or executive board communication.
